series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Human Services Adult Training System
series_metadata.series_description: County provided social service programs for the elderly. Files include technical assistance information and correspondence relating to “meals on wheels” , transportation services and other social services.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 2 years and 3 years in the records center, and until state and federal audits have been completed and released, and all discrepancies are resolved. Destroy if of no historical value to State Archives. ; Electronic: Retain in office 3 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
